title: Add farmer salary and benefits system with modern UI redesign

requirements.text: Create a farmer salary management dashboard that displays salary information, payment history, and compensation details for registered farmers
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays current salary information for logged-in farmers
Payment history is visible with dates and amounts
Compensation breakdown shows base salary and additional components

requirements.text: Implement insurance coverage tracking integrated with farmer compensation packages, allowing farmers to view their insurance details and coverage status

quotes: Insurance coverage tracking (as part of compensation)

acceptanceCriteria: Farmers can view their insurance coverage details
Insurance status is displayed as part of compensation package
Insurance information is stored in farmer profile data

requirements.text: Create a PF (Provident Fund) management and tracking system where farmers can view their PF contributions, balance, and withdrawal history
acceptanceCriteria: Farmers can view their PF account balance
Contribution history is displayed with dates and amounts
PF information is integrated into the farmer profile

requirements.text: Build an assistance request system where farmers can submit requests for technical support teams, post-harvest management help, and other farming assistance needs, with tracking of request status

quotes: farmer can register there for any type of assistance
like might farmer need technical team or post harvest management

acceptanceCriteria: Farmers can submit assistance requests with type selection (technical support, post-harvest management, other)
Request form captures detailed description of assistance needed
Farmers can view their submitted requests with status tracking
Request types include technical support, post-harvest management, and general assistance

requirements.text: Redesign the entire platform with a clean, modern, simplified layout that replaces the current earth-toned color palette with a fresh, contemporary color scheme suitable for a global professional platform

quotes: Modern color palette (updating from current earth tones)

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use a clean, simplified layout with improved whitespace and visual hierarchy
New color palette replaces the existing olive greens, terracotta, and sage colors
Design is professional and suitable for a global employment platform
Color scheme is applied consistently across all components and pages

requirements.text: Enhance the platform with support for displaying pictures and videos throughout the interface, including in farmer profiles, produce listings, knowledge hub articles, and assistance requests

quotes: Support for pictures and videos throughout the platform

acceptanceCriteria: Farmers can upload and display profile pictures
Produce listings support image uploads
Knowledge hub articles can display educational videos and images
Assistance requests can include images to illustrate needs
Images and videos are stored and served efficiently

requirements.text: Redesign the navigation system to be more intuitive and user-friendly, with clear menu structure, improved mobile responsiveness, and easier access to key features for farmers and institutions
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu is reorganized with logical grouping of related features
Mobile navigation is smooth and easy to use
Key actions are easily accessible from the main navigation
Navigation adapts based on user type (farmer vs institution)

requirements.text: Implement multi-language support infrastructure that allows the platform interface to be displayed in local languages, with language selection available to users

quotes: Multi-language support infrastructure for local languages

acceptanceCriteria: Language selector is available in the user interface
Platform supports switching between multiple languages
All user-facing text can be translated
Selected language preference is persisted for returning users

requirements.text: Create a text-based chat assistance system for farmers to get help with platform features, farming questions, and assistance requests without requiring voice processing
acceptanceCriteria: Chat interface is accessible from all farmer pages
Farmers can send text messages for assistance
Chat history is preserved for reference
System provides helpful responses or routes to appropriate support

requirements.text: Replace the current rural-urban flow visualization with a visual directory organized by region and district, allowing farmers and institutions to browse and filter by geographic location
acceptanceCriteria: Directory displays farmers and institutions grouped by region
Users can filter by district within regions
Geographic distribution is clear and easy to navigate
Directory replaces the current RuralUrbanFlowVisualization component

requirements.text: Add prominent, clear call-to-action buttons throughout the platform that guide users to key actions like registering, creating listings, submitting requests, and accessing assistance
acceptanceCriteria: Primary CTAs are visually prominent with modern button styling
CTAs are strategically placed on key pages
Button text clearly communicates the action
CTAs adapt based on user state and authentication status

requirements.text: Improve captions and content presentation across all pages with better typography, spacing, and content hierarchy to enhance readability and user comprehension
acceptanceCriteria: Text content has improved typography with clear hierarchy
Captions are descriptive and properly formatted
Content spacing and layout improve readability
All pages have consistent content presentation standards

constraints: Do not modify the Internet Identity authentication hooks (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx)
Do not edit the actor hook (frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts)
Do not change the main entry point (frontend/src/main.tsx)
Do not modify read-only UI components in frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain the single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
Keep all existing farmer and institution registration functionality intact
Preserve the produce marketplace, knowledge hub, and impact dashboard features
Do not integrate with external voice processing, GPS/geolocation services, or third-party APIs
nonGoals: Integration with external insurance provider APIs
Integration with social media or third-party authentication

required: Professional hero banner image showing diverse farmers working with modern technology for the homepage redesign (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
Icon set for salary dashboard including salary, insurance, and PF icons in modern minimalist style (salary-icons.dim_400x400.png)
Modern farmer profile placeholder image for users without uploaded photos (default-profile.dim_300x300.png)
Visual illustration showing the assistance request workflow from farmer to support team (assistance-flow.dim_800x400.png)
